engines.name: SEO

findings.title: Missing Metadata
findings.issue: No Next.js metadata export was found in the app router.
findings.impact: Search previews, titles, descriptions, and social cards can be incomplete or inconsistent.
findings.recommendation: Add centralized metadata in app/layout.tsx and route-specific metadata where needed.

recommendations: Add OG images for high-value routes

engines.name: Metadata

findings.title: Route metadata not detected
findings.issue: This page does not export metadata or generateMetadata.
findings.impact: Route-level search and social previews may rely on generic defaults.
findings.recommendation: Add route metadata or confirm the inherited layout metadata is sufficient.

recommendations: Use route overrides for important pages

engines.name: Accessibility

findings.title: Missing image alt text
findings.issue: An img element does not include an alt attribute.
findings.impact: Screen reader users cannot understand the purpose of the image.
findings.recommendation: Add meaningful alt text or alt="" for decorative images.

findings.title: Input missing accessible label
findings.issue: An input lacks an id, aria-label, or aria-labelledby attribute.
findings.impact: Assistive technology may announce the control without useful context.
findings.recommendation: Connect the input to a visible label or add an ARIA label.

findings.title: Empty button
findings.issue: A button renders without readable text or accessible naming.
findings.impact: Keyboard and screen reader users cannot identify the action.
findings.recommendation: Add visible text, aria-label, or an accessible icon label.

recommendations: Run browser axe checks before release

findings.title: Raw img element in Next.js UI
findings.issue: The component uses img instead of next/image.
findings.impact: Image optimization, responsive sizing, and CLS prevention can be missed.
findings.recommendation: Use next/image with explicit width, height, and sizes.

findings.title: Client component may be unnecessary
findings.issue: The file is marked use client but no interaction, browser API, or animation usage was detected.
findings.impact: Unneeded client rendering increases JavaScript shipped to users.
findings.recommendation: Convert this file to a Server Component if no client-only behavior exists.

findings.title: Client component may be unnecessary
findings.issue: The file is marked use client but no interaction, browser API, or animation usage was detected.
findings.impact: Unneeded client rendering increases JavaScript shipped to users.
findings.recommendation: Convert this file to a Server Component if no client-only behavior exists.

engines.name: Memory Health

findings.title: Event listener cleanup missing
findings.issue: An event listener is registered without a matching removeEventListener call.
findings.impact: Listeners can stay alive after unmount and cause memory leaks or duplicate behavior.
findings.recommendation: Return a cleanup function that removes every listener registered by the effect.

findings.title: Interval cleanup missing
findings.issue: setInterval is used without clearInterval.
findings.impact: Intervals can continue running after a component is gone, wasting CPU and memory.
findings.recommendation: Store the interval id and call clearInterval from effect cleanup.

recommendations: Clean up subscriptions, timers, observers, and listeners

engines.name: React Diagnostics

findings.title: List item key not detected
findings.issue: A mapped JSX list appears to render without a key prop.
findings.impact: React reconciliation can become unstable and cause incorrect UI updates.
findings.recommendation: Add a stable key from data identity, not the array index when avoidable.

recommendations: Avoid unsafe HTML and unnecessary memoization

engines.name: Runtime Insights

findings.title: Unguarded JSON.parse
findings.issue: JSON.parse is called without a nearby try/catch.
findings.impact: Invalid persisted or API data can crash the rendering path.
findings.recommendation: Wrap parsing in a safe parser and return a typed fallback.

findings.title: Fetch error handling not detected
findings.issue: A fetch call appears without explicit error handling.
findings.impact: Network failures can become uncaught runtime errors or blank UI states.
findings.recommendation: Handle failed responses and network errors with typed fallbacks.

recommendations: Handle parsing and network failures explicitly

engines.name: Component Health

findings.title: Data fetching inside component
findings.issue: A reusable component appears to fetch data directly.
findings.impact: This creates duplicate fetching and weakens page-to-section-to-UI data flow.
findings.recommendation: Move data loading into the page or lib/api and pass typed props down.

recommendations: Keep data loading out of presentational UI

engines.name: Page Health

findings.title: Page is a client component
findings.issue: A route page is marked with use client.
findings.impact: This weakens server-first rendering and can increase JavaScript shipped to users.
findings.recommendation: Keep pages server-only and move interaction into child client components.

recommendations: Keep pages as server data layers

engines.name: Skeleton Coverage

findings.title: Missing skeleton for AnimatedHero
findings.issue: AnimatedHero does not have a matching AnimatedHeroSkeleton component.
findings.impact: Async rendering can show blank or shifting UI during loading states.
findings.recommendation: Create AnimatedHeroSkeleton with layout-matched placeholders.

findings.title: Missing skeleton for MemoryPanel
findings.issue: MemoryPanel does not have a matching MemoryPanelSkeleton component.
findings.impact: Async rendering can show blank or shifting UI during loading states.
findings.recommendation: Create MemoryPanelSkeleton with layout-matched placeholders.

findings.title: Missing skeleton for ProductCard
findings.issue: ProductCard does not have a matching ProductCardSkeleton component.
findings.impact: Async rendering can show blank or shifting UI during loading states.
findings.recommendation: Create ProductCardSkeleton with layout-matched placeholders.

findings.title: Missing skeleton for RuntimePanel
findings.issue: RuntimePanel does not have a matching RuntimePanelSkeleton component.
findings.impact: Async rendering can show blank or shifting UI during loading states.
findings.recommendation: Create RuntimePanelSkeleton with layout-matched placeholders.

recommendations: Add skeletons for async sections and repeated cards

findings.title: Client directive in page
findings.issue: A Next.js page is marked with use client.
findings.impact: The route loses server-first rendering benefits and can increase bundle size.
findings.recommendation: Move interactive UI into a child client component and keep the page server-only.

engines.name: GSAP

findings.title: Missing GSAP cleanup
findings.issue: GSAP animation code does not appear to call ctx.revert() or use gsap.context().
findings.impact: Animations and ScrollTriggers can leak across route transitions.
findings.recommendation: Wrap animations in gsap.context() and return ctx.revert() from the effect.

recommendations: Keep GSAP isolated to client components

engines.name: Engineering Score

findings.title: Build script missing
findings.issue: package.json does not define a build script.
findings.impact: The project is harder to validate consistently before release.
findings.recommendation: Add a deterministic build script and run it in CI.

findings.title: Test script missing
findings.issue: package.json does not define a test script.
findings.impact: Regression confidence is lower and adoption is harder to trust.
findings.recommendation: Add unit or integration tests for critical frontend behavior.

recommendations: Keep build and test commands reliable

topPriorities: Add centralized metadata in app/layout.tsx and route-specific metadata where needed.
Keep pages server-only and move interaction into child client components.
Move interactive UI into a child client component and keep the page server-only.
Add route metadata or confirm the inherited layout metadata is sufficient.
